title: Breeze Rod Model Fix
description: This pack fixes the corrupted Breeze Rod Model.
body:
This pack fixes the issue with the Breeze Rod model, making it now match the Blaze Rod! I was hoping Minecraft would fix this themselves before releasing 1.21 but I guess not lol so here you go!

[Planet Minecraft Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/breeze-rod-model-fix/)
